deep_dive.title: AU-Guided Synthetic Video Generation for Micro-Expression Recognition
deep_dive.abstract: Micro-expression recognition is limited by the small scale, narrow demographic coverage, and restricted emotion labels of existing datasets. We introduce EquiME, a synthetic micro-expression dataset built from AU-guided image-to-video generation. EquiME contains 75K videos generated from 15K source face images across five target emotions, together with automatically inferred demographic metadata and video-quality measurements. We evaluate EquiME using frame-pair similarity, spatial variation, and no-reference perceptual-quality metrics, together with cross-dataset MER experiments on SAMM and CASME II. Models trained on EquiME achieve competitive cross-dataset performance on SAMM and CASME II and show comparatively low variation across the four evaluated architectures. This paper focuses on the dataset design, the structured AU-conditioning pipeline used for video generation, and the empirical evidence needed to assess EquiME as a synthetic MER resource. Project page: https://kirito-blade.github.io/me-vlm/
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于动作单元的图像到视频生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于动作单元的图像到视频生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于动作单元的图像到视频生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces EquiME, a synthetic micro-expression dataset built from AU-guided image-to-video generation, achieving competitive cross-dataset performance on SAMM and CASME II.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对微表情识别数据集规模小、人口多样性不足的问题，本文提出基于动作单元导向的图像到视频生成方法，构建包含7.5万段合成视频的EquiME数据集。该方法从1.5万张源人脸图像出发，自动生成五类目标情感的动态视频，并附带人口统计元数据与质量指标。跨数据集实验表明，在SAMM和CASME II上训练模型性能有竞争力且表现稳定，为微表情识别提供了可扩展的数据增强手段。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对微表情识别数据集规模小、人口多样性不足的问题，本文提出基于动作单元导向的图像到视频生成方法，构建包含7.5万段合成视频的EquiME数据集。该方法从1.5万张源人脸图像出发，自动生成五类目标情感的动态视频，并附带人口统计元数据与质量指标。跨数据集实验表明，在SAMM和CASME II上训练模型性能有竞争力且表现稳定，为微表情识别提供了可扩展的数据增强手段。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: video generation conditioned on an image

deep_dive.title: Wan-Dancer: A Hierarchical Framework for Minute-scale Coherent Music-to-Dance Generation
deep_dive.abstract: Generating long-duration, high-definition, and rhythmically synchronized dance videos directly from music remains a significant challenge, primarily due to the temporal constraints of current diffusion models, which typically fail beyond 20 seconds. Existing approaches, whether they rely on intermediate 3D skeletons or on end-to-end video synthesis, suffer from temporal drift, identity inconsistency, and repetitive motion patterns when extended to longer horizons. To address these limitations, we propose a novel hierarchical framework for minute-scale coherent music-to-dance generation. Our method decouples the process into global keyframe planning and local temporal refinement, leveraging full-track musical context to ensure long-range coherence. Key innovations include dynamic frame rate adaptation via time-mapped RoPE embeddings for precise alignment, an optical-flow-based loss function to enhance motion continuity, and motion-speed control to preserve high-fidelity details during rapid movements. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework surpasses the conventional duration barrier, generating stable, 720p/30fps videos exceeding one minute with superior temporal stability. Furthermore, the model exhibits robust versatility across five distinct dance genres, conditioned on both audio and textual prompts, establishing a new state-of-the-art in coherent, long-form dance video synthesis.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Wan-Dancer uses WAN model for music-to-dance video generation, a multimodal generation task.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: Wan-Dancer 使用 WAN 模型进行音乐到舞蹈的视频生成，属于多模态生成任务。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: Wan-Dancer 使用 WAN 模型进行音乐到舞蹈的视频生成，属于多模态生成任务。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: Wan-Dancer 使用 WAN 模型进行音乐到舞蹈的视频生成，属于多模态生成任务。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes Wan-Dancer, a hierarchical framework that leverages the WAN model to generate minute-long, coherent dance videos from music, overcoming temporal drift and identity inconsistency through global keyframe planning and local refinement.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前扩散模型在生成长时间舞蹈视频时面临时间限制，常出现时间漂移和身份不一致问题。该论文提出 Wan-Dancer 分层框架，将音乐到舞蹈生成过程解耦为全局关键帧规划和局部时序优化，利用完整音乐上下文确保长时连贯性。实验表明，该方法能生成超过一分钟的高清、节奏同步的舞蹈视频，为多模态视频生成提供了有效方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前扩散模型在生成长时间舞蹈视频时面临时间限制，常出现时间漂移和身份不一致问题。该论文提出 Wan-Dancer 分层框架，将音乐到舞蹈生成过程解耦为全局关键帧规划和局部时序优化，利用完整音乐上下文确保长时连贯性。实验表明，该方法能生成超过一分钟的高清、节奏同步的舞蹈视频，为多模态视频生成提供了有效方案。
